Create

Parse
subprograms.code: function Parse (Object : in out Parser) return Types.JSON_Value

documentation.description:
If enabled, raise a Constraint_Error when an object contains
duplicate keys. Parsing a JSON text will be slower if enabled.

formals.name: Types
formals.code: with package Types is new JSON.Types (<>);
